title: palaquium dasyphyllum
intro: Palaquium dasyphyllum, also known as the Red Sap or Dasyphyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. Native to Southeast Asia, this plant is valued for its red latex, which is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The red sap is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the red sap is often used to make topical creams and ointments, as well as being used in traditional remedies for various ailments.
